recent_decisions.decision: PropertyOnion LIVE parity audit COMPLETE with Playwright scraper
recent_decisions.outcome: Replaced Firecrawl (broken on Angular SPA) with Playwright sync API. 3 iterations: PrimeNG input fix (fill() vs click()+type()), login verification fix, JS-based DOM extraction for Angular components. 191 listings extracted (Brevard 17, Hillsborough 45, Orange 47, Polk 38, Palm Beach 44). Count-based gap closing (PO uses addresses, ZW uses case/cert numbers). Browserless+Apify fallbacks created but untested (no API keys). 4 commits: 4287c57, 0c61d62, 4ea1b00, 22e9e63.

scrapers/parity_audit.py: 9-phase audit (PO scrape via Firecrawl, ZW query, parity report, gap closing, field coverage, exclusive intelligence, baseline storage). .github/workflows/parity_audit.yml: weekly + manual trigger with all 5 secrets. ZW-only dry run verified: 241 rows, 7 county/type combos, HOA detection active (18 rows), BCPAO enriched 230/241 (95.4%), ML bid ratio ready (8 rows), net spread ready (20 rows). Field coverage: Brevard FC address 100%, assessed 93.2%, type 93.2%. Known blockers: beds=0% (Cloudflare), non-Brevard plaintiff/judgment gaps.

recent_decisions.decision: 4-county expansion COMPLETE — Hillsborough, Orange, Polk, Palm Beach scraped + enriched
recent_decisions.outcome: 241 rows across 5 target counties (182 Brevard + 19 Hillsborough + 10 Orange + 13 Polk + 17 Palm Beach). Enricher architecture: base class, factory, fl_parcels DOR fallback, per-county GIS enrichers. Palm Beach subdomain fixed (palmbeach not pbcgov). County names normalized to lowercase. Orange rows all TIMESHARE (unenrichable, marked). Enrichment rate: 100% for all expansion counties.
